request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know foreign tech giants are already infiltrating our critical infrastructure? From power grids to water treatment plants, they're exploiting weak regulations to gain control. If we don't act now, our national security could be at risk. It's time to support strategic autonomy and protect our essential systems from foreign influence. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
